captured_on.release: S/4HANA (S4G, EN); initial screen confirmed identical on ECC 7.31 (EC2, JA)

reach.note: Define Background Job. Job name = txtBTCH1140-JOBNAME (plain GuiTextField, NOT ctxt), class = ctxtBTCH1140-JOBCLASS. Step = tbar[1]/btn[6], Start condition = tbar[1]/btn[5], Save job = tbar[0]/btn[11] (Ctrl+S). Full immediate flow walked live on S4G; initial screen confirmed identical on EC2 (JA).

Step (tbar[1]/btn[6]) opens the step popup (wnd[1]). ABAP program = ctxtBTCH1120-ABAPNAME, variant = ctxtBTCH1120-VARIANT (btnABAP_PUSH selects ABAP-program mode). Save step = wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[11]. IMPORTANT: Save lands on the step-LIST overview (SAPMSSY0/120), not the initial screen -- Back (sendVKey 3) until txtBTCH1140-JOBNAME reappears. Verified live.

Start condition (tbar[1]/btn[5]) opens the start-condition popup (wnd[1]). Immediate = btnSOFORT_PUSH (verified live). Date/Time = btnDATE_PUSH -> ctxtBTCH1010-SDLSTRTDT / -SDLSTRTTM. Periodic = chkBTCH1010-PERIODIC; Period Values = wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[5]. Save = wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[11].

After DATE_PUSH + tick PERIODIC, Period Values (wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[5]) opens the recurrence popup (wnd[2], SAPLBTCH/1060): Hourly/Daily/Weekly/Monthly buttons. Save = wnd[2]/tbar[0]/btn[11]. Captured live (dumped); the periodic write path awaits a confirmed run.
